title: Acute Pancreatitis - Severe Epigastric Pain
referralReason: Severe upper abdominal pain for 12 hours
chiefComplaint: Severe upper abdominal pain for 12 hours
presentingComplaintFull: I have had severe upper abdominal pain for the past 12 hours. It started suddenly last night after dinner. The pain is constant and stabbing, and it goes to my back. It is 9 out of 10 in severity. It gets worse when I lie flat, but slightly better when I lean forward. I also feel nauseous, I have vomited several times, and I feel bloated. I had a low fever but I did not measure it.
presentingComplaintShort: Severe upper abdominal pain for 12 hours

abdominalPain.relievingFactors: Slightly better when leaning forward and with analgesia taken at home (cannot name them)

allergies.drugAllergies: NKFDA (No Known Food or Drug Allergies)

questionsToBeAnswered.chiefComplaint: Severe upper abdominal pain for 12 hours

historyOfPresentingIllness.relievingFactors: Slightly better when leaning forward and with analgesia
historyOfPresentingIllness.associatedSymptoms: Nausea, vomiting several times, low grade fever, feeling of abdominal distention
historyOfPresentingIllness.negativeSymptoms: No change in bowel motion, no jaundice, no chest pain or shortness of breath

mostLikelyCausesOfAcutePancreatitis.question: What are the most likely causes of acute pancreatitis in this patient?

answer.clinically: Typically epigastric pain radiating to the back
answer.lab: Amylase, lipase x3 times normal level

bestTimeForCholecystectomy.question: What is the best time to do cholecystectomy?

consentAndExplain.description: Consent and explain what want to do

causesOfPancreatitis.description: What are the most likely causes of acute pancreatitis in this patient?

bestTimeForCholecystectomy.description: What is the best time to do cholecystectomy?

generalAppearance.build: Stocky, medium-to-large frame, visible abdomen (central obesity)
generalAppearance.posture: Hunched forward, slightly curled, holding upper abdomen or leaning forward - key visual clue for pancreatic pain relief posture
generalAppearance.facialExpression: Grimacing, flushed, visibly in distress, sweating on forehead and upper lip

skin.colour: Normal for ethnicity, flushed appearance particularly on cheeks and neck
skin.perspiration: Diaphoretic - moist with perspiration on forehead, temples, and upper lip

eyes.expression: Slightly narrowed from pain, brow furrowed

face.mouth: Slightly open, breathing may appear shallow

hair.description: Short, dark brown or black, minimal grey, may appear slightly damp from perspiration

neck.description: Thick, muscular appearance, slight sheen of perspiration visible

hands.position: One hand may be placed on upper abdomen (protective posture)

clothing.description: Casual comfortable clothing: simple dark-colored t-shirt (to contrast with flushed skin), possibly open button-up overshirt, slightly disheveled or wrinkled, no tie or formal wear

visualDescription.backgroundSetting: Emergency department or acute care setting, examination bed visible behind him or clinic chair with medical equipment in background

avatarPersonality.responseStyle: In severe pain, grimacing, hunched forward holding abdomen, sweating, distressed. Cooperative but clearly uncomfortable. Speaks with difficulty due to pain. May pause mid-sentence due to pain waves.

diagnosticTests.clinical: Typically epigastric pain radiating to the back
diagnosticTests.lab: Amylase, lipase x3 times normal level

presentingComplaint.short: ألم شديد في أعلى البطن منذ 12 ساعة
presentingComplaint.full: عندي ألم شديد في أعلى بطني من 12 ساعة. بدأ فجأة البارحة بالليل بعد العشا. الألم ثابت وطاعن وبيروح على ظهري. شدته 9 من 10. بيزيد لما أنام على ظهري بس بيخف شوي لما أنحني للأمام ومع المسكنات يلي أخذتها بالبيت بس ما بعرف أسماءها. كمان عندي غثيان واستفرغت كذا مرة وحاسس بانتفاخ بالبطن وحرارة خفيفة بس ما قستها.

abdominalPain.aggravatingFactors: يزداد سوءاً عند الاستلقاء على الظهر
abdominalPain.relievingFactors: يتحسن قليلاً عند الانحناء للأمام ومع المسكنات

associatedSymptoms.bowelMotionChange: لا يوجد تغير في حركة الأمعاء

systematicReview.urinary: لا يوجد أي خلل بولي أو تغير في لون البول

arabicTranslations.allergies: لا توجد حساسية دوائية أو غذائية معروفة (NKFDA)

diagnosticTests.clinical: ألم شرسوفي نموذجي يمتد إلى الظهر
diagnosticTests.lab: أميلاز، ليباز أكثر من 3 أضعاف المستوى الطبيعي
diagnosticTests.imaging: تصوير بالموجات فوق الصوتية للبطن / تصوير مقطعي للبطن
